subcodes.first_line: The hearts of all that are in the world have been stirred by the fragrant breezes that have wafted from the garden of nations, from the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اهتز قلوب من فى العالم من نفحات عبقت فى حدیقة الامم من ملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Greatest Name, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
